violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (blueberries, onions) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with red biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
At time of inspection, hummus and cheese were observed with date mark of 4/28 which exceeds the 7 days. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Cheese and chicken were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Orzo feta pasta salad and almond cranberry couscous packaged in the food establishment are lacking COMPLETE labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Prep Unit door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hand wash sink have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The floor junctures throughout the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

Working containers of dry goods are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The cutting boards in the ware washing area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of red residue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Inspector observed leak under dump sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the ware washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
Inspector observed gaskets in the prep unit is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
